arts.ttl: Arsenal, Liverpool and Tottenham closely following in-demand 18-goal star
arts.sum: Eintracht Frankfurt striker Omar Marmoush has been linked with a move away from the Bundesliga. According to Footmercato, the 25-year-old is on the radar of multiple Premier League clubs. Arsenal, Liverpool and Tottenham Hotspur are following the player closely ahead of a potential move. Meanwhile, Manchester City have already acted on their interest and they […] The post Arsenal, Liverpool and Tottenham closely following in-demand 18-goal star appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer news: Gunners add Bayern Munich star to list of Bukayo Saka replacements
arts.sum: Arsenal are reportedly considering a Bayern Munich attacker as a potential option to replace the injured Bukayo Saka.

arts.ttl: West Ham make move to sign 120k-a-week Arsenal star
arts.sum: Just like the summer transfer window, West Ham United are expected to be active in the January transfer window to make changes to their squad. They are currently struggling in the bottom half of the Premier League table and most of their summer signings have failed to make an impact at the club. arts.ttl: Brighton vs Arsenal LIVE: Premier League team news and line-ups as Gunners look to close gap to Liverpool
arts.sum: Arsenal are six points behind the league leaders Liverpool but can cut that to three with a win at Brighton

arts.ttl: Brighton vs Arsenal LIVE! Premier League match stream, latest team news, lineups, TV, prediction today
arts.sum: Gunners looking to build on New Year’s Day win over Brentford

In late 2024, a new name began being linked with Arsenal as Atalanta's Mateo Retegui was said to have appeared on their radar. Arsenal are'serious' about signing Atalanta striker Mateo Retegui, according to Italian media.

arts.ttl: Viktor Gyokeres sends Mikel Arteta fresh Arsenal transfer message at perfect time
arts.sum: Arsenal transfer target Viktor Gyokeres has proven his worth yet again by scoring another three goals in his latest Sporting CP performance. Although the striker himself has previously thrown cold water on any January transfer taking place, anticipation still continues to build for the summer 2025 window.

arts.ttl: Arsenal drop triple team news hint for Brighton clash as Jurrien Timber replacement 'revealed'
arts.sum: The latter made it on to the pitch and Arteta has since revealed that Havertz is fit to feature, but Jurrien Timber is unavailable due to suspension after picking up a fifth yellow card in the final top-flight game before the threshold of bookings increases to 10. In the ongoing absence of Ben White and Takehiro Tomiyasu, Timber has been required on a number of occasions with issues for Riccardo Calafiori also seeing Myles Lewis-Skelly feature more frequently for their first-team.

arts.ttl: Man United, Arsenal 'handed fresh blow' in 'pursuit' of Wolves star Matheus Cunha
arts.sum: Wolverhampton Wanderers are reportedly looking to sign Matheus Cunha, who continues to be linked with Manchester United and Arsenal, to a new contract.
